title: What can monday CRM do for your nonprofit?
excerpt: We’ll be joined by an expert from the monday CRM team who can highlight all the great new features available exclusively on this product. The session will also be carefully framed to highlight what is relevant for nonpro…

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: We’ll be joined by an expert from the monday CRM team who can highlight all the great new features available exclusively on this product. The session will also be carefully framed to highlight what is relevant for nonprofits and you’ll soon see that a CRM is much more than a classic sales tool.

posts.author: CityKidz (Richard Brooks)
posts.cookedHtml: I just saw this today - sorry I missed it. Are you planning another presentation sometime soon?
